name: London Borough of Tower Hamlets Council
summary: The London Borough of Tower Hamlets Council, is the local authority responsible for delivering council and local government services within Tower Hamlets, East London. Its services cover areas such as housing, council tax, education, waste, planning, social care, community safety and local democracy. The borough is known for its cultural diversity, dense urban population and position at the heart of London’s East End.
role: CRM Transformation & Technical Project Management Professional
